title: omphalissa aulica
intro: Omphalissa aulica, also known as the navel wort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae and is native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of omphalissa aulica include relieving symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive problems such as irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of omphalissa aulica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health issues.
